description: CompositionBlue and white printed kurta made of 100% cotton, has a round neck with a mock buttoned chest placket with lace around it, three-quarter sleeves with stone embellishments on a blue band at the cuffs, ruched and elasticated on the shoulders, pintucks and stone embellishments on the front, and has split side seamsFitRegularWash careWash cold using a mild detergentDo not bleachDry in shadeWarm iron do not iron on decorationsThis elegant kurta from vishudh speaks volumes of your class and exudes femininity with its timeless design and cuts. The traditional print is sure to make this a wardrobe favourite. Pair it with leggings or skinny jeans.Model statisticsThe product is a size M on a model of height 5'7", chest 33" and waist 25"
